options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
ATTEMPTS TO BALANCE THE PROGRESSION OF YOUR ITEMS.

SETTING THE VALUE LOWER WILL RESULT IN MORE WAITING TO RECIEVE ITEMS.

SETTING THE VALUE HIGHER WILL RESULT IN LESS WAITING TO RECIEVE ITEMS.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
SETS THE RULES FOR THE ABILITY TO REACH ALL ITEMS.

- **Full** *GUARANTEES THAT ALL ITEMS CAN BE OBTAINED.*

- **Minimal** *GUARANTEES ONLY WHAT IS NECESSARY, BUT NO MORE.*

options.name: item_balancing
options.description:
IF AN ITEM IS OBTAINED EARLY, ITS POWER WILL BE SCALED DOWN.

*Formula is basically `item_stat * (current_chapter / item_chapter)`, only scalling down*

options.name: death_link
options.description:
YOUR FAILURE CAUSES THE FAILURE OF EVERYONE WHO HAS ENABLED THIS OPTION.

TO COMPLIMENT, THE REVERSE IS TRUE AS WELL.

options.name: better_odds
options.description:
SHOULD RNG-DEPENDING THINGS HAVE BETTER ODDS TO HAPPEN?

- **Chapter 1&2 Eggs**

options.name: remove_starting_equipment
options.description: DO YOU WISH TO REMOVE THE STARTING EQUIPMENT FOR EACH CHAPTER?

options.name: randomize_chapters
options.description:
HOW WILL YOU PROGRESS THROUGH THE CHAPTERS?

- **In Order** *The next chapter will be unlocked once you complete the one you're in.*
- **Randomized** *Chapters are unlocked through getting items. In Multiplayer, be prepared to wait a while!*
- **All Unlocked** *All chapters are unlocked from the start. You will be expected to play through another chapter once stuck.*

*(The goal is closing the final fountain of each chapter whatever the option chosen.)*

options.name: starting_chapter
options.description: IF CHAPTER ARE RANDOMIZED, WHICH CHAPTER WOULD YOU START WITH?

options.name: macguffin_extra
options.description: THE AMOUNT OF EXTRA ITEM IS IN THE ITEMPOOL TO UNBLOCK THE ROAD TO FINAL BOSSES

options.name: include_chapter_1
options.description:
DO YOU WISH TO PLAY CHAPTER 1?

*Items from this chapter will also be included*

options.name: macguffin_chapter_1
options.description:
A NEW ROADBLACK WILL APPEAR BEFORE THE FINAL BOSS OF CHAPTER 1

THIS OPTION DETERMINES HOW MANY OF THESE ITEMS WILL BE REQUIRED TO PROGRESS.

(King-Shaped Key Pieces)

options.name: chapter_1_recruit
options.description: DO YOU WISH TO HAVE THE RECRUIT/LOSE SYSTEM FOR CHAPTER 1?

options.name: include_chapter_2
options.description:
DO YOU WISH TO PLAY CHAPTER 2?

*Items from this chapter will also be included*

options.name: include_lose_swatchling
options.description:
DO YOU WISH TO INCLUDE LOSE SWATCHLING?

*It requires either reloading your save in all routes or doing Singapore Wrong Warps in weird route.*

options.name: exclude_post_chapter_2_locations
options.description:
WILL POST-CHAPTER 2 LOCATIONS BE KEEP AWAY FROM HOLDING IMPORTANT ITEMS?

- CH2: Castle Town - Tasque Manager Says Challenge
- CH2: Castle Town - Ch2 All Stars Challenge

options.name: macguffin_chapter_2
options.description:
A NEW ROADBLACK WILL APPEAR BEFORE THE FINAL BOSS OF CHAPTER 2

THIS OPTION DETERMINES HOW MANY OF THESE ITEMS WILL BE REQUIRED TO PROGRESS.

(KeyGen 2 Segments)

options.name: include_chapter_3
options.description:
DO YOU WISH TO PLAY CHAPTER 3?

*Items from this chapter will also be included*

options.name: macguffin_chapter_3
options.description:
A NEW ROADBLACK WILL APPEAR BEFORE THE FINAL BOSS OF CHAPTER 3

THIS OPTION DETERMINES HOW MANY OF THESE ITEMS WILL BE REQUIRED TO PROGRESS.

(Remote Batteries)

options.name: randomize_mantle
options.description:
CHECKS RECIEVED IN THE ORIGINAL GAME OF THE THIRD CHAPTER WILL BE RANDOMIZED.
MANTLE/ERAM CAN ALSO BE EXCLUDED FROM MANDATORY SECRET BOSSES

- **Mantleless** *Items in the ORIGINAL GAME will be randomized and Mantle/ERAM isn't mandatory if secret bosses is set to mandatory*

options.name: include_shadow_mantle
options.description:
THE SHADOW MANTLE WILL BE IN THE ITEM POOL OF THE THIRD CHAPTER.

- **False** *The Shadow Mantle is the reward for beating Mantle/ERAM*
- **True** *The Shadow Mantle will be in the itempool in logic before Knight fight*

options.name: exclude_t_rank
options.description: GETTING THE HIGHEST RANK OF THE THIRD CHAPTER WILL BE EXCLUDED FROM CONTAINING IMPORTANT ITEM.

options.name: exclude_z_rank
options.description: GETTING THE LOWEST RANK OF THE THIRD CHAPTER WILL BE EXCLUDED FROM CONTAINING IMPORTANT ITEM.

options.name: include_chapter_4
options.description:
DO YOU WISH TO PLAY CHAPTER 4?

*Items from this chapter will also be included*

options.name: macguffin_chapter_4
options.description:
A NEW ROADBLACK WILL APPEAR BEFORE THE FINAL BOSS OF CHAPTER 4

THIS OPTION DETERMINES HOW MANY OF THESE ITEMS WILL BE REQUIRED TO PROGRESS.

(Combination Lock Digits)

options.name: include_mike
options.description: WILL THE DEFEAT OF THE MICROPHONE AS WELL AS THEIR GAMES COUNT AS CHECK LOCATIONS?

options.name: exclude_mike_platinum
options.description: WILL THE PLATINUM TROPHY BE KEEP AWAY FROM HOLDING IMPORTANT ITEM?

options.name: filler_healing_weight
options.description: DETERMINES HOW OFTEN HEALING ITEMS WILL APPEAR COMPARED TO OTHERS ITEMS.

options.name: filler_currency_weight
options.description: DETERMINES HOW OFTEN ALL CURRENCIES WILL APPEAR COMPARED TO OTHERS ITEMS.

options.name: trap_weight
options.description: DETERMINES HOW OFTEN TRAPS WILL APPEAR COMPARED TO OTHERS ITEMS.

options.name: filler_armor_weight
options.description: DETERMINES HOW OFTEN ARMOR ITEMS WILL APPEAR COMPARED TO OTHERS ITEMS.

options.name: filler_tension_weight
options.description: DETERMINES HOW OFTEN TENSION ITEMS WILL APPEAR COMPARED TO OTHERS ITEMS.

options.name: filler_smile_weight
options.description: DETERMINES HOW OFTEN IT WILL SMILE.

options.name: chosen_route
options.description:
CHOOSE THE ROUTE YOU WANT TO GO THROUGH

- **Neutral Route** *Proceed through the story normally.*
- **Weird Route** *Proceed through the "Weird Route" storyline while losing all possible recruits.*
- **All Recruits** *Progress through the story by recruiting everyone.*
- **All Routes** *Both All Recruits and Weird Route at the same times.*
  *(Doesn't require to finish multiple times chapter, either ending would count as completing a chapter)*

*The chosen route only choose if recruiting or loosing recruits are included or not.
This doesn't require you to finish a chapter with a specific route.*

options.name: randomize_secret_bosses
options.description:
ITEMS GIVEN BY THOSE POSSESSING SHADOW CRYSTALS WILL BE RANDOMIZED OR EVEN REQUIRED.

- **Mandatory** *Secret Bosses rewards will be randomized and required to do to complete chapter*

*Secret bosses are: Jevil, Spamton Neo, Mantle/ERAM, Knight, Gerson*

options.name: include_hidden_items
options.description:
RANDOMIZES ITEMS THAT ARE CONSIDERABLY MORE DIFFICULT TO FIND OR TEDIOUS TO OBTAIN.

- **Golden Prizes**
- **Eggs**
- **Dog Dollars**
- **Moss**

options.name: include_secret_bosses_items_requirement
options.display_name: Randomize Items required for Secret Bosses
options.description:
RANDOMIZES ITEMS THAT ARE NEEDED TO FIGHT SECRET BOSSES.

- **Broken Keys**
- **Door Key**
- **KeyGen**
- **Empty Disk**

*(For MANTLE items, see the mantle option)*

options.name: include_unused_items
options.description:
CERTAIN ITEMS ARE NOT NORMALLY PRESENT.
WILL THEY NOW BE WITH THE REST.

- **True without EveryBodyWeapon** *Include unused items without EveryBodyWeapon that is a super powerfull unbalanced item probably used by the dev team for debug*

options.name: progressive_kris_weapons
options.description: THE WEAPONS RECEIVED FOR THE CAGE WILL BE IN SEQUENTIAL ORDER OF RISING POWER.

options.name: progressive_susie_weapons
options.description: THE WEAPONS RECEIVED FOR THE GIRL WILL BE IN SEQUENTIAL ORDER OF RISING POWER.

options.name: progressive_ralsei_weapons
options.description: THE WEAPONS RECEIVED FOR THE PRINCE WILL BE IN SEQUENTIAL ORDER OF RISING POWER.

options.name: progressive_noelle_weapons
options.description: THE FORBIDDEN RINGS WILL BE IN SEQUENTIAL ORDER OF RISING POWER.

options.name: unlock_characters
options.description: YOU WILL HAVE TO UNLOCK CHARACTERS OTHERWISE THEY WILL BE -666HP

options.name: unlock_fun_gang_actions
options.description: ACTIONS OF THE GIRL, THE PRINCE AND THE WHITE CLOAK WILL BE AN ITEM

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
